entries.name: Bulbasaur
entries.label: Eggs — Sunday — Normal
entries.source_text: Trainers, please note that on the first day of the Road to Legends event, Bulbasaur, Charmander, and Squirtle in 5 km Eggs will have Party Hats instead of Pikachu Visors because of the overlapping 10th Anniversary Party event. This applies to any Eggs obtained from midnight to 8:00 p.m. local time on July 6, 2026.

entries.name: Mewtwo
entries.label: Eggs — Sunday — Normal
entries.source_text: GO Pass: Road of Legends Earn a Lucky Trinket at rank 100! Trainers who upgrade to the Deluxe pass can encounter Mewtwo with a Special Background at rank 90 and a Gold Bottle Cap at rank 100. Points / rank 100 Detailed Compact

entries.name: Mewtwo
entries.label: Eggs — Sunday — Normal
entries.source_text: Earn a Lucky Trinket at rank 100! Trainers who upgrade to the Deluxe pass can encounter Mewtwo with a Special Background at rank 90 and a Gold Bottle Cap at rank 100.

entries.name: Larvesta
entries.label: Eggs — Sunday — Normal
entries.source_text: Featured Eggs will be available starting Monday, July 6. If you're lucky, Larvesta may hatch from 2 km, 5 km, or 10 km Eggs!
